2. Fully Enclosed Aluminum Frame for Maximum Protection

  • Heavy-Duty Sealed Structure: Engineered with a premium aluminum oxide metal frame and a fully enclosed back panel, offering a complete seal over the entire internal electrical system.

  • Enhanced Safety & Lifespan: By keeping out bathroom steam, condensation, and dust, this fully sealed structure protects the internal drivers and LED components from corrosion, ensuring long-lasting performance.

  • Effortless & Secure Installation: Equipped with precision-engineered safety hanging holes on the back frame, allowing for stable, easy, and reliable vertical wall mounting.

3. Dimmable 3-Color CCT & Smart Touch Sensor

  • Intelligent Ambience Control: Easily switch between Warm, Natural, and Cool White lighting via the highly sensitive touch sensor to suit your makeup, grooming, or relaxation needs.

  • Stepless Dimming & Smart Memory: Long-press the button to adjust light brightness seamlessly from a soft ambient glow to maximum vanity illumination. The built-in smart memory chip automatically saves your last brightness and color settings.

4. Advanced Anti-Fog Function & Wall Switch Support

  • Crystal Clear Vision: Equipped with an integrated independent anti-fog heating pad that quickly clears moisture from the mirror center, providing a fog-free reflection even after the steamiest showers.

  • Flexible Power Control: Fully supports both direct plug-in and hardwired connections, allowing the mirror's light to be conveniently controlled via a standard bathroom wall switch.

specs.value: 5mm environmental copper free mirror with shatter-proof film

name: Premium Acrylic Framed LED Vanity Mirror
shortDescription: Modern Illuminated LED Bathroom Mirror with 35mm Acrylic Glow Frame, Anti-Fog Backlit Vanity Mirror, Dimmable Wall Mounted Smart Mirror with 3 Color CCT & Memory Function
fullDescription:
1. Premium 35mm Acrylic Diffusing Frame & 3D Glow

  • Seamless Edge-Lit Aesthetics: Engineered with a specialized 35mm thick frosted acrylic border that acts as a premium light guide. Light glows beautifully from both the front and sides, erasing harsh shadows and creating an immersive 3D ambiance

  • Dot-Free Soft Illumination: The frosted acrylic frame perfectly diffuses the internal LED lights, completely hiding visible individual light bulbs to deliver a continuous, ultra-soft, and flawless neon-like glow

2. Smart Touch Dimming & Smart Memory Chip

  • Effortless Brightness Control: Long-press the integrated, highly sensitive touch sensor to seamlessly dim or brighten the illumination from a soft 10% ambient glow to a crisp 100% full vanity light

  • Intelligent Personal Memory: Features an advanced built-in smart chip that automatically remembers and locks your preferred brightness and color settings for your next use, eliminating the need for daily manual readjustments

3. Customizable 3-Color CCT Tuning

  • Versatile Atmosphere Setting: Short-press the smart control button to instantly switch between Warm White, Natural Day Light, and Cool White tones . This flexibility lets you easily create the ideal light environment for professional makeup application, shaving, or a relaxing evening bath.

4. Eco-Friendly 5mm Copper-Free HD Mirror

  • Flawless Crystal Reflection: Built with an eco-friendly 5mm high-definition copper-free silver mirror layer that offers true-to-life imaging with zero peripheral distortion or green hue tints.

  • Corrosion-Resistant Longevity: Highly optimized to resist rapid silver oxidation, black edges, and humidity peeling, guaranteeing a pristine reflection that stands up to decades of damp bathroom conditions.

5. Factory-Direct Commercial Grade Customization

  • Flexible OEM/ODM Solutions: As a premier B2B manufacturer, we offer multi-functional custom integration options . Elevate your product line by adding smart digital displays (time/temperature indicators), custom sizing, or advanced multi-touch controls .

  • Strict Quality & Global Compliance: Fully IP44 waterproof tested with premium components built to pass international certification standards, ensuring safe operation and reliable project sign-offs.

name: Modern LED Bathroom Mirror with Seamless Aluminum Frame
shortDescription: Premium Seamless Aluminum Framed LED Vanity Mirror – Anti-Fog Smart Hub with Inlaid Silicone Glow Strip, 5mm Copper-Free HD Glass, IP44 Waterproof for Luxury Hotels & Residential Projects
fullDescription:
1. Seamless Aluminum Frame & Sleek Engineering

Flawless One-Piece Craftsmanship: Built with an advanced seamless aluminum frame that eliminates ugly corner joints and gaps, presenting a highly sophisticated, clean-lined aesthetic from every angle.

Structural Durability: The heavy-duty aluminum alloy housing provides robust protection against warping and moisture, ensuring long-lasting structural integrity in humid bathroom environments.

2. Inlaid Silicone Diffuser for Dot-Free Glow

Uniform 3D Backlit Illumination: Features a premium, custom-fitted inlaid silicone lampshade that expertly diffuses the internal LED strips. It delivers an ultra-soft, smooth neon-like glow while completely eliminating harsh pixelated light dots.

Optimal Eye Protection: The high-transmittance silicone diffuser softens the light source, offering bright, shadow-free illumination that is perfectly optimized for detailed grooming, shaving, and makeup application without causing eye fatigue.

3. Smart Anti-Fog Technology with Auto-Off

Instant Fog-Free Clarity: Equipped with an integrated rapid-heating defogging pad that keeps the center of the mirror perfectly clear, even during steam-filled showers.

Energy-Saving 1-Hour Auto Shut-Off: Designed with an intelligent built-in safety timer that automatically turns off the defogging function after 1 hour of continuous operation, preventing energy waste and overheating.

4. 3-Tone Seamless Dimming & Smart Memory

Customizable Color Temperatures: Easily cycle through Warm White, Natural Daylight, and Cool White light modes with a simple tap on the highly responsive touch sensor to set the ideal room mood.

Intelligent Brightness Adjustment: Supports smooth, stepless dimming from a gentle ambient glow to maximum vanity brightness, while the smart memory chip automatically locks your last-used setting for your next use.

name: Premium Circular LED Vanity Mirror – Seamless Aluminum Framed
shortDescription: Modern Round LED Bathroom Mirror with Seamless Aluminum Frame, Inlaid Silicone Diffuser Backlit Vanity Mirror, Dimmable Circular Smart Mirror with 3 Color CCT & Anti-Fog Function
fullDescription:
1. Minimalist Circular Aesthetics & Seamless Aluminum Frame

  • Flawless Curvature Engineering: Crafted with a premium, continuous seamless aluminum frame featuring zero visible gaps or joints along its elegant circular edge

  • Sleek Space-Enhancing Design: The timeless round silhouette softens geometric bathroom lines, creating a spacious, luxury boutique feel that perfectly complements modern and minimalist interior styles

2. Inlaid Silicone Diffuser for Premium Dot-Free Backlighting

  • Immersive Halo Effect: Built with a custom-fitted inlaid silicone lampshade that evenly disperses internal LED light . It delivers a flawless, dot-free halo effect that radiates beautifully against the wall

  • Shadow-Free Vanity Lighting: The advanced silicone diffusion layer softens glare and eliminates harsh shadows, providing comfortable, bright illumination ideal for professional makeup application and daily grooming .

3. Smart Defogging with Safety Auto-Shutoff

  • Instant Vapor-Free Clarity: Features a high-efficiency built-in defogging pad that quickly clears persistent condensation from the center of the mirror during hot, steamy showers .

  • Intelligent 1-Hour Energy Saver: Engineered with an automated 1-hour timer safety function that shuts off the heating element, preventing unnecessary power consumption and extending the mirror's lifespan .

4. 3-Color CCT Tuning & Stepless Dimming with Memory

  • Atmospheric Light Control: Short-press the highly sensitive touch sensor to cycle through Warm White, Natural Daylight, and Cool White tones to instantly change your room's vibe

  • Seamless Customization & Memory: Long-press to smoothly adjust brightness from a soft 10% night-light glow to 100% full clarity . The integrated memory chip automatically saves and locks your preferred setting for your next use .

5. Factory-Direct B2B Expertise & Project Customization

  • Comprehensive OEM/ODM Capabilities: Backed by over 20 years of vertical integration expertise, we offer robust structural scaling and advanced feature customization—including custom dimensions, multi-touch controls, and digital smart hubs showing time/temperature .

  • Commercial-Grade Compliance: Built with eco-friendly 5mm copper-free HD glass and reliable waterproof internals, offering overseas wholesalers and hospitality project managers stable supply chains and certified quality .
